---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing skill or tool integration
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like improved?

Which skill or tool does this relate to, or is this a new addition?

## Use Case

What marketing task or scenario would this help with? Who would use this?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, workflow, or content you'd like to see added.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you worked around this in another way? What are the tradeoffs?

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help evaluate this request.
